zh.Horbury, Wakefield, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾霍爾波利
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Land Sr.於1571年12月1日出生在英國英格蘭越可爾霍爾波利時，他的父親Thomas Samuel Land25歲，母親Johanna Wormell26歲。他於1623年5月26日與Ann Juret Wormall在英國英格蘭越可爾 韋斯特 利丁結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1647年1月3日在他的家鄉享年75歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭韋斯特 越可爾霍爾波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Land Sr.于1571年12月1日出生在英国英格兰越可爾霍爾波利时，他的父亲Thomas Samuel Land25岁，母亲Johanna Wormell26岁。他于1623年5月26日与Ann Juret Wormall在英国英格兰越可爾 韋斯特 利丁结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1647年1月3日在他的家乡享年75岁，埋葬在英国英格兰韋斯特 越可爾霍爾波利。

nameMeanings.name: Land
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, German, and Dutch: topographic name from Old English, Middle Dutch land, Middle High German lant ‘land, territory’. This had more specialized senses in the Middle Ages, being used to denote the countryside as opposed to a town or an estate.
English: topographic name from Middle English launde ‘glade’ (Old French land), or a habitational name from a place called with this word, such as Launde in Leicestershire or Laund in Yorkshire.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of the three farmsteads so named, from Old Norse land ‘land, territory’ (see 1 above).

variants.name: Lander
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): topographic or status name from Middle High German lant, German Land ‘land, territory’ (see Land 1). Compare Landmann .
German: topographic name from Middle High German lander ‘picket fence’.
German: from the personal name Lanther, see Landherr 1.

variants.name: Lands
meanings: English: variant of   Land  .

variants.name: Landt
meanings: German: variant of   Land   1.

variants.name: Lande
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from any of several farmsteads, so named from either the dative singular or the plural form of land (see Land 3).
German: from the old personal name Lando, a short form of ancient Germanic names formed with lant ‘land’ (see Land ).

French: topographic name for someone living on a heath, moor, French lande (from Gaulish landa ‘space, land’), or a habitational name from any of numerous minor places called La Lande from this word. Compare Lalande .

variants.name: Landfried
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Chantel.
South German: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements land ‘land, territory’ (see Land ) + fred, frid ‘peace’. This surname is also found in France (Lorraine).

variants.name: Lawn
meanings: English:
variant of   Land   2.
from Middle English laun ‘lawn, fine linen’ (French laun, from the name of the city of Laon), perhaps for a maker or trader.

variants.name: Landa
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Jorge, Jose, Luis, Juan, Manuel, Enrique, Jesus, Julio, Mario, Roberto, Miguel.

Basque: topographic name from landa ‘(large) field, prairie’. There is a place of this name in Araba/Álava province, Basque Country (Spain), and the surname may also be a habitational name from this place.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of several farmsteads in southwestern Norway, so named from the plural of land ‘land, territory’ (see Land 3).

variants.name: Lant
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Land   with devoicing of the final consonant.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Land Sr. was born on 1 December 1571, in Horbury, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Samuel Land, was 25 and his mother, Johanna Wormell, was 26. He married Ann Juret Wormall on 26 May 1623, in Yorkshire West Riding, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 3 January 1647, in his hometown, at the age of 75, and was buried in Horbury, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Land Sr. est né le 1 décembre 1571, à Horbury, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Samuel Land, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Johanna Wormell, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Ann Juret Wormall le 26 mai 1623, à Yorkshire West Riding, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 3 janvier 1647, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à Horbury, West Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Land Sr. am 1. Dezember 1571 in Horbury, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Samuel Land 25 und seine Mutter Johanna Wormell 26. Er hat am 26. Mai 1623 in Yorkshire West Riding, England, United Kingdom Ann Juret Wormall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 3. Januar 1647 im Alter von 75 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Horbury, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Land Sr. è nato il il 1 dicembre 1571 nel Horbury, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Samuel Land, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Johanna Wormell, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Ann Juret Wormall il 26 maggio 1623, nel Yorkshire West Riding, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 6 figlie. ja.Horbury, Wakefield, Yorkshire, England: イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアホールブリー
ja.lifeSummary: William Land Sr.が1571年12月1日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアホールブリーで生まれた時，父Thomas Samuel Landは25歳，母Johanna Wormellは26歳であった。1623年5月26日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア ウエスト リディングでAnn Juret Wormallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1647年1月3日に故郷で75歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウエスト ヨークシュアイアホールブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Land Sr.(이)가 1571년 12월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 호르버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Samuel Land(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Johanna Wormell(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1623년 5월 26일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 웨스트 리딩에서 Ann Juret Wormall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1647년 1월 3일 그의 고향에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 요르크실르 호르버이에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Land Sr. родился 1 декабря 1571 г. в местности хаурбури, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Samuel Land было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanna Wormell, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Ann Juret Wormall 26 мая 1623 г. в местности еркшир вест ридинг, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер 3 января 1647 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности хаурбури, вест еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Land Sr. nació el 1 de diciembre de 1571, en Horbury, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Samuel Land, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Johanna Wormell, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Ann Juret Wormall el 26 de mayo de 1623, en Yorkshire West Riding, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 3 de enero de 1647, en su pueblo, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultado en Horbury, West Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
